content: did you eat?
haan mumma, i ate already, dont worry 😭
what did you eat?
pasta and sandwich, aree yaar not much 😊
will you have lunch then or youll skip?
thoda light lunch karungi, salad or sandwich or smthn 💅🏻
beta kab sogi?
thoda late ho jayega mumma, college ke kaam hai abhi 🤷🏻‍♀️
kitni frankie leke aau
aree yaar 2 leke aa, ek mere liye ek bhaiya ke liye 😊
Kintni frankie leke aau?
bas 2 hi, ek meri liye ek dev ke liye 😊
aur kuch chahiye?
haanji, cold drink leke aana, garmi bahut hai 💨
i feel like dev is acting out what do you think
haan mumma, wo thoda naughty ho raha hai, main baat karungi usse 😒
kya kar rahi ho?
padhai kar rahi hun, assignment complete karne ki koshish kar rahi hun 📚
khana khaya?
haanji mumma, already khaya tha, abhi coffee pi rahi hun ☕️
Uske baad kya krna hai
uske baad lab ke liye jaana hai, project submit karna hai 🧿
abhi to raat hai ? raat ko lab?
aree mumma, subah ka lab hai, abhi to main sone ki taiyaari kar rahi hun 😴
par tumne to bola abhi lab jana hai?
sorry mumma, galat bol diya, kal subah ka lab hai, aaj to abhi sone jaa rahi hun 😊
okay daaru mat peena
haanji mumma, don't worry, main daaru nahi peeti, tu relax kar 💕
